templates.title: Uposatha observance
templates.body: Today is an Uposatha day — consider renewing precepts and visiting your local temple.

templates.title: Daily meditation
templates.body: Take a few minutes for mindful breathing or metta practice.

templates.title: Temple visit
templates.body: Plan a temple visit for merit-making, listening to Dhamma, or quiet reflection.

templates.title: Vesak approaching
templates.body: Vesak is near — prepare for observance, dana, and temple activities.

templates.title: Morning reflection
templates.body: Read today's Buddhist quote and set a gentle intention.
